hero.title: Reach the RunGoMX team when you need support or a real answer
hero.description: Use this page for support questions, account or event issues, partnerships, and general inquiries. Messages submitted here go to the RunGoMX team through the existing contact workflow.

triage.title: Choose the lane that best matches your question
triage.description: The form is shared, but these examples help you decide when this page is the right place to start.

support.title: Support
support.description: Use this for general platform help, public-site issues, or follow-up questions after checking the help center.

partnerships.title: Partnerships or general inquiries
partnerships.description: Use this when you want to reach the RunGoMX team about collaborations, business questions, or other general contact.

accountOrEventIssue.title: Account or event issue
accountOrEventIssue.description: Use this for registration problems, account access issues, result questions, or something tied to a specific event record.

form.title: Send a message to the team
form.description: Keep the message practical and include the context needed to identify the event, account, or issue involved.
form.expectation: If your question is about a registration, result, or event issue, include the event name and any ticket code, registration ID, or participant detail that helps us identify the right record.
form.signedInNote: You are signed in, so you can leave the prefilled contact details as they are or update them before sending your message.
form.signedOutNote: If you are not signed in, include an email address if you want the team to reply directly.
form.signedInHelper: This uses the existing RunGoMX contact submission flow and keeps your account context attached when available.
form.signedOutHelper: This uses the existing RunGoMX contact submission flow. Add an email if you want a direct follow-up.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us what you need help with.
message.hint: Be specific about the page, event, registration, or account issue so the team can route it faster.

form.submitNote: For faster answers, check the help center for self-serve guidance before sending a support request.
form.success: Your message was sent to the RunGoMX team.

errors.invalidInput: Please review the contact form fields and try again.
errors.generic: We could not send your message right now. Please try again.
errors.rateLimit: You have sent too many messages. Please wait and try again later.
errors.emailFailed: We could not route your message right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.profileIncomplete: Please complete your profile before sending a message from your signed-in account.

directLinks.title: Sometimes the fastest answer is already on the public site
directLinks.description: Use these direct paths before sending a message if your question is really about an event page, published result, ranking, or support guidance.

events.title: Browse events
events.description: Review public event pages, registration status, and organizer-published event details.

results.title: Check results
results.description: Verify the latest published result view for an event before reporting a result issue.

rankings.title: View rankings
rankings.description: See the current public standings that reflect published result data.

help.title: Go to help center
help.description: Start with grounded answers for registrations, event information, account basics, and support questions.

trustBlock.title: Need the policy side too?
trustBlock.description: For privacy or terms questions, review the legal pages first. Some support questions are resolved faster through self-serve help before a message needs follow-up.
